parameters.name: group_by
parameters.description: Required. Dimension: brand | sku | supplier | sales_channel | product_type | sub_sales_channel

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: Required. Time interval: day | week | month | quarter | year

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Optional. Number of periods to return

parameters.name: metrics[]
parameters.description: Optional. Metrics to include: revenue | cogs | total_cost | profit | quantity | num_orders | margin
